samples.text: All humans are mammals. All mammals are living organisms. Are humans living organisms?
Every member of humans is among mammals. Every member of mammals is among living organisms. Does it follow that humans are living organisms?
All people are vertebrates. All vertebrates are living organisms. Are people living organisms?
living organisms include all mammals. mammals include all humans. Therefore, are humans living organisms?
All humans are mammals. All mammals are living organisms. The report is due on Friday. Are humans living organisms?
